meaning: v.(使)反跳,弹起,(指支票)被银行退票,弹跳n.(球)跳起,弹回
examples: There's not much bounce left in these balls.
Players complained about the uneven bounce of the tennis court.
There was a bounce to his step.
For the short term, at least, some analysts are encouraged by the silver bounce on Thursday.
People bounce back and forth from social hubs based on links their friends are sharing.
